## Summary

Describe the behavioral change in queue semantics, CLI behavior, schema shape, or test coverage.

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated when database behavior changed
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`

## Operational Notes

- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Migration impact documented if schema or event behavior changed
- [ ] Follow-up work tracked if this is intentionally partial
